clauses.title: Eligibility Age Requirement
clauses.text: Eligible applicants were unemployed Ulsan residents aged 19 to 34.

clauses.title: Required Documents
clauses.text: Applicants had to submit resident registration, job-seeking proof, and a bankbook copy.

clauses.title: Application Deadline
clauses.text: Applications closed on March 31 each year.

clauses.title: Support Amount
clauses.text: Interview preparation support amount was up to 300000 KRW per person.
